---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new endpoint, enhancement, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Zijian-Ni
---

## Summary

A brief, one-sentence description of the requested feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the endpoint or change you'd like to see. Include example request/response if applicable.

```json
GET /api/analytics/new-endpoint/?param=value

{
  "example": "response"
}
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Any references, related issues, or further notes.
